debug_info.goal:
case h.cons
h :
  ∀ (x : ℕ) (ps : List (Partition ℕ)),
    filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl x) ps) =
      concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl x) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)
a : ℕ
as : List ℕ
ih :
  filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) =
    List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as
h1 :
  ∀ (ps : List (Partition ℕ)),
    filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl a) ps) =
      concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)
⊢ filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) =
    List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] (a :: as)

proof:
simp_all [List.foldr, List.cons, Function.comp, flip]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [∀ (x : ℕ) (ps : List (Partition ℕ)), filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl x) ps) = concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl x) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [h1])
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h2 := h1 []
        have h3 := h1 [[]]
        simp [filter, concatMap] at h2 h3
        <;>
        simp_all [filter, concatMap]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h2 := h1 [[]]
        simp [filter, concatMap] at h2
        <;>
        simp_all [filter, concatMap]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [filter, concatMap]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [filter, concatMap]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
